title: Number Of Restricted Paths From First To Last Node
description: Count paths from 1 to n in a connected 1-indexed undirected weighted graph whose distance-to-n strictly decreases at each step, modulo 1e9+7. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int, edges: list[list[int]]. 1 <= n <= 20000; connected 1-indexed undirected graph; at most 40000 edges; positive weights <= 100000.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
